# [clang] Assertion `getType(Base)->isPointerType() || getType(Base)->isArrayType()' failed

**Author:** ym-xie
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/122080
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-01-08T17:59:12Z

## Body

code
```c
u8 b;
extern short b[];
extern signed char c[];
int main() {
  for (long j = 3; j < 1024; j += 3)
    if (c[j] ? b[j] : 0)
}
```
just crash on assertion trunk
https://godbolt.org/z/ovMj7TePr
same assertion message https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/120085

<details><summary><strong>Backtrace</strong></summary>
<p>


---

### Comment 2 - shafik

For crashes only on assertions build for C code switch to `clang++ -x c` and see how far back the crash goes, this one goes back to clang-7: https://godbolt.org/z/rq94afvEY

Using this trick I think should become apparent this is really: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/69468

---
